history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H. Moving forward would go to row 02 column C, which is lava `L`, so that is unsafe. I should rotate to look for a safe path around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front, row 03 column B, is safe (`.`), and moving forward helps me go around the lava field toward the lower open corridor leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front, row 04 column B, is safe and continues the route through the open corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead, row 05 column B, is safe, so I should continue forward to move toward the open path below.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

</thought>
<action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right. The next cell, row 08 column C, is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. I should continue turning to face the safe open path upward or downward instead of entering lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down again. The cell ahead is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. To avoid staying blocked, I need to turn to face the open direction toward the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right, and the cell ahead at C08 is lava, so I must not move forward. I should rotate to seek a safe route around the lava line.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>

</thought>

GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

<thought>

GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
